title: [ImportVerilog] Indexed ranges don't generate correct code

features.name: indexed part select in LHS concatenation assignment
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment with indexed part selects using [index-:width] syntax on the left-hand side

features.name: indexed part select indexed up in LHS concatenation
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment with indexed part selects using [index+:width] syntax on the left-hand side

features.name: slice part select in LHS concatenation assignment
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment with slice part selects using [msb:lsb] syntax on the left-hand side
